strategy: High Risk / High Return - Aggressive Short-Term Stock Picks
analyst_note: The hottest momentum today is concentrated in AI infrastructure and quantum computing names, with IONQ and RKLB both breaking out on institutional accumulation ahead of Q2 conference season. Biotech is heating up with two PDUFA dates in the next 10 trading days creating binary event setups in small-cap names. Bitcoin has reclaimed $72,000 overnight, sending high-beta crypto proxies like MSTR and COIN surging pre-market on heavy volume. Defense tech and space names continue their multi-week run as government contract flows remain strong, making RKLB a dual momentum plus fundamental play.
market_summary: Strong risk-on tape with small caps leading, crypto proxies surging on BTC breakout above $72k, and AI names hitting fresh 52-week highs on continued institutional rotation into growth.

macro_backdrop.key_risk: Federal Reserve speakers Wednesday and Thursday could signal higher-for-longer pivot, killing risk sentiment instantly and reversing all momentum names sharply.

picks.name: MicroStrategy Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: MSTR is the highest-beta Bitcoin proxy in the market, historically moving 2-3x BTC's daily percentage move. With BTC breaking $72k, MSTR is positioned for an explosive continuation move.
picks.thesis: BTC reclaimed the $72,000 level overnight with massive volume, breaking a 6-week consolidation range and targeting $80,000 next. MSTR holds over 214,000 BTC on its balance sheet and has historically front-run BTC moves with leveraged beta, making this a high-conviction momentum entry right now.
picks.technical_setup: MSTR broke above the $410 resistance level that capped three prior attempts over the last 5 weeks. Volume is running 180% of the 20-day average. 50-day MA has crossed above the 200-day MA (golden cross confirmed last week). RSI at 64 - momentum but not yet overbought.
picks.catalyst: Bitcoin sustained breakout above $72,000 with institutional buying momentum; MSTR premium to NAV expanding as retail FOMO kicks in.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $413. Enter today or tomorrow morning. Do not chase above $425 - wait for a dip back to $410-415 range if you miss the open.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% of shares at $468 (conservative +13.3%). Let remaining shares ride to $540 if BTC holds above $72k. Exit ALL shares if BTC drops below $69,000.
picks.stop_note: If MSTR closes below $380 (prior consolidation base), exit all shares immediately. BTC reversal will accelerate losses quickly.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - can move 12-15% in a single session on BTC volatility
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $468 conservative target. Move stop to breakeven ($413) on remaining shares after 8% gain. Trail stop $30 below price as it rises. Exit all before July 7.
picks.risk_factors: BTC drops below $69k invalidates entire thesis instantly. Fed hawkish surprise Wednesday would crush crypto. MSTR premium to NAV could compress even if BTC holds.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: This stock can lose 20-25% as fast as it gains. BTC volatility is the primary driver - not business fundamentals.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search MSTR  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $413  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: IonQ Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: IONQ is the pure-play quantum computing leader and has been consolidating for 3 weeks after a 40% run. A fresh breakout on institutional buying ahead of Q2 earnings and a DoD contract announcement creates the setup for another explosive leg higher.
picks.thesis: IONQ broke above the $37.50 resistance level today on volume 220% of average, with institutional block trades appearing in the tape suggesting smart money accumulation ahead of a DoD quantum computing contract expected by end of June. Quantum computing names are getting fresh analyst upgrades this week as the sector enters a new phase of commercial deployment.
picks.technical_setup: Clean breakout above 3-week consolidation triangle at $37.50. Volume surge confirms institutional participation. 20-day MA has crossed above 50-day MA. MACD just fired a bullish crossover. Prior 52-week high was $43.80 - that is the first major target.
picks.catalyst: Expected DoD quantum computing contract announcement by June 30; also Q2 revenue guidance update at upcoming investor day June 27.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $38.00. If stock opens above $39.50, wait for a pullback to $38-38.50 before entering. Do not chase above $40.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $44.00 (near prior 52-week high). Hold remaining shares with target of $52 if DoD contract is confirmed. Exit all shares by July 7 regardless.
picks.stop_note: Close below $34.50 means breakout failed. Exit immediately - do not average down on a failed breakout.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - quantum names can gap 15-20% on single news items
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $44. Move stop to $38 (breakeven) on remainder. Trail stop $3 below price on the way up. Lock in profits before July 7.
picks.risk_factors: DoD contract delayed or awarded to competitor destroys catalyst. Broader tech selloff on Fed news would hit hard. High short interest means sharp moves both ways.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Quantum computing stocks are speculative. No earnings profitability. Can drop 20-30% on no news in a risk-off day.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search IONQ  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $38.00  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Rocket Lab USA Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: RKLB is breaking out of a 4-week base on heavy volume with a confirmed launch scheduled for June 28 and growing Neutron rocket program catalysts. Space sector has strong institutional inflows and RKLB is the highest-beta pure-play.
picks.thesis: RKLB has a confirmed Electron launch window opening June 28 for a commercial payload, which historically drives 10-20% moves in the week surrounding launches. Additionally, the company is expected to announce a major Neutron rocket program partnership with a defense contractor by end of Q2, which would be transformational for the $2.4B backlog story.
picks.technical_setup: Breaking out of 4-week ascending triangle consolidation above $24.50 resistance. Volume today is 195% of 20-day average. RSI at 61 with room to run. 50-day MA at $22.10 provides strong support floor. All-time high at $31.20 is the stretch target.
picks.catalyst: Electron launch window June 28; potential Neutron partnership announcement before June 30 earnings preview.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $24.50. Acceptable to enter up to $25.20. Do not chase above $25.50 - wait for a morning dip if market opens higher.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $28.50 around launch date. If Neutron partnership news drops, ride remaining shares toward $33. Set hard stop on all shares at $22.50 after entry.
picks.stop_note: Below $22.50 the breakout has failed and 50-day MA support is broken. Exit all shares without hesitation.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - launch events create sharp moves; failure scenarios exist
picks.exit_plan: Sell 50% at $28.50. Move stop to $24.50 breakeven on rest. Trail $2 below price. If launch succeeds and stock gaps, sell into strength not into pullback.
picks.risk_factors: Launch scrub or failure drops stock 15-20% instantly. Defense budget news could hit sector. Neutron delays are well-known risk. Risk-off tape would crush high-beta space names.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Rocket launch binary risk - scrubs and anomalies happen. Position size must be small.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search RKLB  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $24.50  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Palantir Technologies Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: PLTR is the premier AI-meets-defense software play and is breaking to new 52-week highs with accelerating government contract flow. High short interest of 21% means any surge gets amplified as shorts cover.

With 21% short interest and government AI spending accelerating into fiscal year-end (September 30), institutional buyers are aggressively accumulating shares ahead of Q2 earnings.
picks.technical_setup: New 52-week high breakout above $106 on volume 240% of 20-day average. RSI at 68 - elevated but not extreme. Price above all major moving averages with 20-day MA rapidly approaching 50-day from below. Strong momentum setup targeting prior all-time high zone.

picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $107. If stock dips back to $105-107 range tomorrow, that is an ideal entry. Do not chase above $111.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $122 pre-earnings. If you want to hold through earnings, reduce to 25% of original position only. The other 50% should be sold at $122 regardless.
picks.stop_note: Close below $98 means breakout is a false breakout. Exit immediately. The $100 round number should hold - if it doesn't, something is wrong.
picks.volatility_profile: High - moves 5-8% on single news items; earnings could be 15%+ move
picks.exit_plan: Sell 50% at $122. Move stop to $107 breakeven on rest. Decide before July 5 whether to hold through earnings - reduce position if uncertain. Never let a winner turn into a loser.

picks.exit_plan: Sell 50% at $282. Trail stop $15 below price on remaining shares. Monitor BTC level religiously - COIN follows BTC with a lag. Exit all by July 7.

picks.name: SoundHound AI Inc.

picks.thesis: SOUN reported a major automotive AI contract win yesterday after market close with a Tier-1 auto manufacturer for voice AI integration across 12 new vehicle models, representing $180M in potential revenue over 3 years. picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $11.60. Given squeeze potential, acceptable to chase up to $12.20 on initial entry. Buy in two tranches - 60% now, 40% on any dip to $11.20-11.50.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $14.50 into squeeze strength. Hold remaining 50% with $13 trailing stop. Sell into spikes - do not wait for perfect top on a squeeze.
picks.stop_note: Close below $10.50 means squeeze has failed to ignite and gap is filling. Exit all shares. Do not average down on failed squeezes.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - thin float squeeze candidate, can move 20%+ in a single session
picks.position_size_pct: 1% of portfolio MAX - this is the most speculative pick
picks.exit_plan: Sell into strength aggressively. Squeezes reverse violently - sell 50% at $14.50, another 25% at $16. Keep last 25% for $18 moonshot only if volume stays extreme. Never hold a squeeze through a reversal.

picks.name: Novavax Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: NVAX has an FDA PDUFA action date of July 7 for its updated COVID-influenza combo vaccine NovaCOVax-FLU. Stock has been beaten down 60% from highs, creating asymmetric upside on approval with significant short interest of 28%.
picks.thesis: The FDA is expected to render a decision on NVAX's NovaCOVax-FLU combo vaccine by July 7 PDUFA date, and recent FDA Advisory Committee feedback was more favorable than expected at the June 15 meeting. With the stock trading at historic lows and 28% short interest, an approval would likely trigger a 60-100% move while a Complete Response Letter limits downside given how much is already priced in.
picks.technical_setup: Stock has been consolidating in a tight $8.80-$9.60 range for 2 weeks after the AdCom meeting. Volume contracting indicating coiling action. Any PDUFA-positive leak or early approval would create explosive gap up. Downside support at $7.50 area (multi-year low).
picks.catalyst: FDA PDUFA action date July 7, 2026 for NovaCOVax-FLU combo vaccine approval decision.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $9.00. Buy before June 27 to have position established well before PDUFA. Do not chase above $9.80. This is a binary event - size accordingly.
picks.sell_note: On approval: Sell 50% immediately into the gap up. Hold remaining 50% with $11 stop for further upside. On rejection (CRL): Exit ALL immediately at open - do not wait.
picks.stop_note: If stock breaks below $7.80 before PDUFA (bad news leak, guidance withdrawal), exit immediately. On PDUFA day, hold through decision unless stock collapses pre-market.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - binary event. Approval could double stock, rejection could cut it 40-50%.
picks.position_size_pct: 1% of portfolio MAX - binary event, sizing critical
picks.exit_plan: Pre-PDUFA sell plan: If stock runs 20%+ before July 7, sell 50% to reduce binary risk. On approval day: sell 50% into open gap, hold rest. On rejection: sell everything at open.
picks.risk_factors: FDA issues Complete Response Letter (CRL) - stock drops 40-50% same day. Manufacturing concerns at FDA facility could delay action. Stock has history of disappointments on vaccine programs.
picks.warning: EXTREME RISK: This is a pure binary FDA bet. You can lose 40-50% in one day if rejected. Only use money you can afford to lose completely.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search NVAX  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $9.00  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Upstart Holdings Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: UPST reports earnings July 7 and analysts have consistently underestimated their AI lending platform growth in falling rate environments. With 2 rate cuts behind us, credit markets improving, and low Street expectations, a big beat could drive 30-40% gap up.
picks.thesis: UPST is set to report Q2 earnings on July 7 with Street expecting only $0.12 EPS on $165M revenue, but improving credit conditions, rising auto loan originations, and the company's expanded bank partner network suggests actual results could be $0.28-0.35 EPS on $195M+ revenue. The AI lending model outperforms traditional credit scoring in improving rate environments and the company guided conservatively last quarter.
picks.technical_setup: UPST broke above the $55 resistance level last week and is consolidating in the $56-60 range on moderate volume. RSI at 58, room to run. 50-day MA just crossed above 200-day MA (golden cross). Prior earnings gap territory was $75-85 last cycle - that is the aggressive target.
picks.catalyst: Q2 earnings report July 7 with high beat probability given improving consumer credit metrics and bank partner loan volume data.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $57.50. Buy before June 26. Reduce position by 30% before earnings if stock has already run 15%+. Never hold full position into a binary earnings event.
picks.sell_note: Sell 40% at $68 pre-earnings if achieved. On earnings beat: sell 30% more into gap. Hold final 30% with $65 stop for $82 target. On earnings miss: exit all at open.
picks.stop_note: Close below $51.50 means technical setup has failed. Exit. This level represents a clean break of all key moving averages.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - UPST has moved 25-50% on earnings multiple times in both directions
picks.exit_plan: Trim 40% pre-earnings at $68 if achieved. Hold 60% into earnings only if stock has not already run 15%+. Post-earnings gap up: sell 50% into open, trail stop on rest. Miss = exit all.
picks.risk_factors: Earnings miss due to credit tightening or bank partner withdrawals would crater stock 30%+. High short interest provides squeeze fuel but also means heavy selling on disappointment. Macro recession fears hit UPST hard.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Fintech names have massive earnings volatility. Reduce position before earnings report or risk sharp two-way move.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search UPST  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $57.50  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

Prior trading range pre-controversy was $75-110, creating enormous recovery potential if institutional trust fully returns.

picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $55. Hold rest to $65 if earnings show clean recovery. Exit all before July 13 regardless. If accounting concerns resurface in any form, exit immediately.

picks.name: Viking Therapeutics Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: VKTX is the highest-conviction GLP-1 obesity drug challenger to Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly. Phase 3 trial initiation announcement expected by June 30 for their oral VK2735 program, which could trigger 25-40% move on positive data readout context.
picks.thesis: VKTX is expected to announce Phase 3 trial initiation for oral VK2735 (obesity) by June 30, which would represent the most important clinical milestone in the company's history and confirm their oral GLP-1 program is on track. The obesity drug market is worth $150B+ annually and VKTX's clean Phase 2 data showing superior weight loss to injectables at 24 weeks has already attracted partnership interest from Big Pharma.
picks.technical_setup: VKTX consolidated in $32-36 range for 4 weeks after a volatile spring. Volume picking up on the buy side over last 5 sessions. RSI at 52 - neutral and coiling. Breaking above $35.50 with conviction opens path to $44-48. 200-day MA at $29.50 provides strong floor.
picks.catalyst: Phase 3 trial initiation announcement for oral VK2735 expected by June 30; potential Big Pharma partnership announcement (rumored discussions with Roche) before Q2 earnings.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $34.50. Acceptable entry up to $36. Split entry into two tranches if volatile. Do not chase above $37.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $43 if Phase 3 announcement received positively. Hold rest to $52 only if partnership rumors confirmed. On clinical negative surprise: exit all immediately.
picks.stop_note: Below $29.50 (200-day MA) the technical setup has broken down. Exit all shares promptly. Biotech breaks of 200-day MA often accelerate to the downside.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - biotech news driven, can gap 20-30% on single announcement
picks.exit_plan: Sell 50% at $43 on Phase 3 news. Move stop to $34 breakeven on rest. If Big Pharma partnership announced: sell 25% more into spike. Hold final 25% to $52 with trailing stop.
picks.risk_factors: Phase 3 trial delayed due to FDA guidance issues drops stock 20-30%. Competitor data from Lilly or Novo reduces VKTX differentiation perception. Broader biotech selloff could compress multiples before catalyst.

daily_wisdom: The market rewards those who buy the breakout and punish those who buy the breakdown hoping for a bounce. Your only job is to be right on direction and survive long enough to collect - use small positions, tight stops, and sell half into strength. The trade that never gets to its stop loss because you sold too early is the one that keeps you in the game for the next opportunity.
risk_warning: EXTREME RISK: Every single pick in this report is a highly speculative, high-volatility stock that can lose 20-50% as rapidly as it gains.
